name: error-parent-empty
description: An empty parent_harness_session_id is ambiguous (absent vs. no-parent) and is rejected; callers must omit the field. A well-behaved producer never emits an empty parent header, so this only arises from a malformed one.

error.rule: omit the field instead of sending empty

grounding: An empty parent-session-id is ambiguous (absent vs. no-parent) and is rejected; omit the field instead.
